description: Odoo 17 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.10+, OWL frontend
_overlay_doc: Version-specific invariants merged on top of project invariants.json by a FUTURE installer step (setup.py --merge-invariants, not yet wired — Wave C). Same schema as .agent-toolkit/invariants.json entries. severity=warn (informational). Cite a confirmed Odoo release fact per entry.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 17 deprecates name_get(); use _compute_display_name() to set display_name.
invariants_overlay.rationale: name_get() is deprecated in v17 (gone-by-default in v18 per odoo-17-patterns.md / odoo-18-patterns.md). Models needing custom display logic must implement `_compute_display_name()` instead. Fix when violated: restore the `_compute_display_name` override / `display_name =` assignment the edit dropped.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 17 removed attrs="{...}" and states="..." on view fields — use Python expressions directly (invisible="state == 'done'").
invariants_overlay.rationale: attrs="{...}" and states="..." were REMOVED in v17 and now raise a parse error (odoo-17-patterns.md). Conditional UI must use direct Python-expression attributes (invisible/readonly/required). Fix when violated: restore the direct-expression attribute the edit dropped, and never reintroduce attrs/states.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 17 create() takes a list of vals and must be decorated @api.model_create_multi; single-record @api.model create(vals) silently breaks batch inserts.
invariants_overlay.rationale: From v17 create() is batch-oriented and must use @api.model_create_multi(vals_list); a single-record @api.model create(vals) override silently breaks batched inserts (odoo-17-patterns.md). Fix when violated: restore the @api.model_create_multi decorator the edit dropped.
